name: Cherry Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Glace cherries (1/2 lb), cut into halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg.
2. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg yolks and vanilla, beating well after each addition.
4. Alternate adding 1-1/4 cups of the flour mixture with milk, beginning and ending with flour, while beating to combine.
5. Fold in beaten egg whites until just combined.
6. Sprinkle half of the remaining flour over the batter, then add the cherries.
7. Sprinkle the rest of the flour over the cherries.
8. Bake in a greased 5x9 loaf pan for about 1 to 1-1/2 hours at 350°F until set.
Note: This recipe was found in a recipe box purchased at a garage sale and shared by Sharon Stevens.
